title: India: Torrent Group Inaugurates Green Hydrogen Plant in Uttar Pradesh as State Eyes 1Mtpa Target
content: Torrent Group has brought Indiaâ€™s second green hydrogen plant online in Gorakhpur, Uttar Pradesh, inaugurating the project on Sunday with state chief minister Yogi Adityanath hailing hydrogen as â€œthe energy of the future.â€ The new facility, jointly developed by Torrent Power and Torrent Gas, is the first in the state and aims to produce 72 tonnes per year of green hydrogen for blending into natural gas pipelines at concentrations of up to 2%.
author: Analysts Account
